questions.question_text: Suman asked her friends at ________ time she would come back.
I asked Sheela, "Why are you looking so pale today?"

options.label: A
options.text: I said to Sheela why was she looking so pale that day.

options.label: B
options.text: I was asking Sheela why she is looking so pale today.

options.label: C
options.text: I asked Sheela why she was looking so pale that day.

options.label: D
options.text: I asked to Sheela why she looking so pale today.

questions.correct_answer: I asked Sheela why she was looking so pale that day.
questions.explanation_text: 'I asked Sheela why she was looking so pale that day', is the correct indirect speech of the given sentence.

questions.question_text: He said, "can you sing?" and I said, "no."

options.label: A
options.text: He asked me that could I sing and I refused.

options.label: B
options.text: He asked me if I could sing and I replied that I could not.

options.label: C
options.text: I denied, when he asked me if you could sing.

options.label: D
options.text: He asked me if I could sing and I said no.

questions.correct_answer: He asked me if I could sing and I replied that I could not.
questions.explanation_text: In the given Direct speech, a question is asked. Hence, said would be replaced by 'asked' and the question would start with 'if'. Further, there is also a reply. Hence, 'replied' would be used with 'that'.

questions.question_text: The book is being ________ by me.
I asked Jyoti ________ she travelled to office.
She told me ________ she had been to London.

Out of the given options, choose the one which is the correct indirect speech of the sentence given below.
Mother said to the children, "I have often told you not to play with fire."

options.label: A
options.text: Mother told the children that she has often told them not to play with fire.

options.label: B
options.text: Mother told the children that she had often been telling them not to play with fire.

options.label: C
options.text: Mother told the children that she had often told them not to play with fire.

options.label: D
options.text: Mother told the children that she have often told them not to play with fire.

questions.correct_answer: Mother told the children that she had often told them not to play with fire.
questions.explanation_text: Mother told the children that she had often told them not to play with fire.

questions.question_text: Suraj asks Mohit where he went ________.
A stone ________ being thrown by him yesterday.
Ajay said, "I love this city".

options.label: A
options.text: Ajay said that I love this city.

options.label: B
options.text: Ajay said that he loved that city.

options.label: C
options.text: Ajay said if I love that city.

options.label: D
options.text: Ajay told that he loved this city.

questions.correct_answer: Ajay said that he loved that city.
questions.explanation_text: Ajay said that he loved that city.

questions.question_text: She said to me, "What are you writing"?

options.label: A
options.text: She asked me if she was writing

options.label: B
options.text: She ask me that what I was writing

options.label: C
options.text: She told me what she was writing

options.label: D
options.text: She asked me what I was writing

questions.correct_answer: She asked me what I was writing
questions.explanation_text: She asked me what I was writing

questions.question_text:
Choose the one which is the correct indirect speech the sentence given below.
He said, "I can speak four languages."

options.label: A
options.text: He boasted that he will be able to speak four languages.

options.label: B
options.text: He boasted that he can speak four larguages.

options.label: C
options.text: He boasted that he would speak four languages.

options.label: D
options.text: He boasted that he could speak four languages.

questions.correct_answer: He boasted that he could speak four languages.
questions.explanation_text: He boasted that he could speak four languages.

questions.question_text: She says to Shweta, "We have to go home".

options.label: A
options.text: She told Shweta that we have to go home.

options.label: B
options.text: She tells Shweta that we have to go home.

options.label: C
options.text: She tells Shweta that they have to go home.

options.label: D
options.text: She asked Shweta if they have to go home.

questions.correct_answer: She tells Shweta that they have to go home.
questions.explanation_text: She tells Shweta that they have to go home.

A crazy man asked me whether I ________ the way to paradise.

Rafiq said that ___________ next day.

She said that __________ the following day.
